title: Enemy Armor Hud
description: Karşısındaki oyuncunun zırh dayanıklılığı gözükür - If you looking enemy you can see enemy's armor durability
body:
# Enemy Armor Hud

**Enemy Armor Hud** is a comprehensive client-side Fabric mod designed to give you a tactical advantage by displaying detailed information about your opponent's armor during combat.


## 🌟 Key Features

### 🛡️ Armor Status Display
*   **Full Set Tracking:** Instantly view the Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots of the player you are targeting.
*   **Exact Durability:** Displays the precise numerical durability remaining on each armor piece.
*   **Visual Durability Bar:** Option to show the vanilla-style green/red progress bar over the items.

### ⚔️ Durability Difference (New!)
*   **Comparative Stats:** Automatically calculates the difference between **your armor** and your **opponent's armor**.
*   **Tactical Advantage:**
    *   **(+) Green Values:** Indicates you have a durability advantage (You are "Ahead").
    *   **(-) Red Values:** Indicates you are at a disadvantage (You are "Behind").
*   *Example: If you have 300 durability and your opponent has 270, it will display `+30`.*

### 🎨 Customization & HUD
*   **Player Info:** Toggle the display of the target player's name.
*   **Fully Configurable:**
    *   **Positioning:** Move the HUD anywhere on your screen (X / Y coordinates).
    *   **Scaling:** Adjust the size of the entire HUD or just the text to fit your preference.
    *   **Toggle Visibility:** Turn off specific armor pieces if you only care about Helmets, for example.
    *   **Durations:** Control how long the HUD stays visible after hitting a player.
*   **Color Themes:** Customize the text colors for High, Medium, and Low durability states to match your UI.

## ⚙️ Configuration

This mod is fully integrated with **Mod Menu**. You can access all settings in-game:

1.  Press `ESC` -> Mods -> Enemy Armor Hud -> Config.
2.  **General:** Set Position, Scale, Duration, and Background Opacity.
3.  **Visuals:** Toggle Durability Difference, Progress Bars, Player Names, and Text Scale.
4.  **Colors:** Define your preferred colors for durability thresholds.

## 📋 Requirements

*   **Minecraft:** 1.21.1 or higher
*   **Loader:** Fabric Loader
*   **Dependencies:**
    *   [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
    *   [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required for config screen)
    *   [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Recommended for accessing settings)

## 📥 Installation

1.  Download the latest release `.jar`.
2.  Install **Fabric Loader** for your Minecraft version.
3.  Place the mod `.jar` file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
4.  Ensure you have **Fabric API** and **Cloth Config** in the mods folder as well.
5.  Launch the game and dominate your PVP battles!

---
*Created by dukedev*
